name: Sunset
description_short: This is not a consumer finance company. The website is a timekeeping tool showing sunrise/sunset data for Haslet, Texas, not a financial service provider.
description_long: The website at https://www.timeanddate.com/sun/@7173586 is operated by timeanddate.com, a free timekeeping and astronomy information service. It provides astronomical and solar data for specific geographic locations, in this case the City of Haslet, Texas. The site displays sunrise and sunset times, daylight length calculations, twilight periods (astronomical, nautical, and civil), solar noon times, sun altitude and direction readings, and seasonal solstice information. There is no consumer finance offering, no lending products, no credit services, and no financial transactions of any kind available on this platform. The content is purely informational astronomy data updated dynamically based on geographic coordinates and current date. This appears to be a data entry error or miscategorization in the CreditDoc database, as 'Sunset' (presumably named after sunset times) has been incorrectly assigned to the payday-alternatives category despite being a free public utility tool with zero financial services. There is no company called 'Sunset' offering payday alternatives or any lending product associated with this domain. The website contains no login functionality, no account creation, no pricing information, and no contact details for any financial services company.
